name: v5.3 — Autonomous Forge
cto_brief: v5.3 crosses the autonomy threshold. Three pillars: Closed-Loop Autonomy, Production Hardening, Intelligence Compounding.

items.title: Proposal Execution Engine
items.description: ProposalExecutor in new @agentforge/executor package. Takes a proposal, generates plan, dispatches agent pipeline (Architect→Coder→Linter), runs in sandbox, produces validated ExecutionResult with diff and test summary.

items.title: Continuous Evaluation Pipeline
items.description: EvaluationPipeline in core — persistent metric collectors for cost, error rate, latency, agent success rate. Anomaly detection fires auto-proposals via SelfProposalEngine. POST /api/v5/evaluation/trigger, GET /api/v5/evaluation/metrics.

items.title: Approval Gateway & Promotion
items.description: Human-in-the-loop approval queue. REST API: GET/POST /api/v5/approvals, PATCH /api/v5/approvals/:id/approve|reject. WebSocket event on status change. Dashboard approval page with diff viewer and impact summary.

items.title: Agent Performance Scoring
items.description: AgentScorecard: per-agent quantitative scores (completion rate, cost efficiency, latency). Stored in DB, updated per session. GET /api/v5/agents/:id/scorecard. Feeds routing decisions via AdaptiveRouter.

items.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration Engine
items.description: Orchestrator with YAML workflow DSL — parallel fan-out, sequential pipelines, conditional branching, cost-budgeted execution. POST /api/v5/workflows/run.

items.title: Semantic Memory & Knowledge Graph
items.description: Graph layer on embeddings+SQLite. Entity extraction, relationship mapping. /api/v5/knowledge endpoints.

items.title: Canary Deployments
items.description: Feature flag system. Traffic splitting for agent routing. Auto-rollback on metric regression.

items.title: Cost Optimization Autopilot
items.description: Always-on: model-tier auto-selection, semantic response caching, batch aggregation, redundant invocation pruning.

items.title: Resilience & Self-Healing
items.description: Circuit breakers on all agent calls, exponential backoff retry, graceful degradation. CircuitBreaker + RetryPolicy in @agentforge/shared. Health-check-triggered self-healing. Dashboard health page with breaker status.

items.title: Agent Marketplace
items.description: Plugin registry, agent template publishing, sandboxed execution, dashboard marketplace UI.

items.title: Natural Language Command Interface
items.description: NL → agent workflows/config/queries. Dashboard chat panel with knowledge graph context.

items.title: Cross-Instance Federation
items.description: Opt-in sharing of learnings and performance data across AgentForge instances.

items.title: Predictive Sprint Planning
items.description: Analyzes historical data, generates draft sprint with effort estimates, risk scores, business impact.

items.title: OpenTelemetry Distributed Tracing
items.description: Trace context propagation across all agent invocations, DB queries, API requests. Dashboard trace explorer.

items.title: Adversarial Testing Framework
items.description: Adversarial input generator, chaos engineering toolkit, regression suite gate on all self-modifications.

items.title: v5.3 Release
items.description: Bump to 5.3.0, mark sprint complete, retro.
